title: mild creamy Indian tempeh Curry
description: A sweet and creamy Indian dish featuring tempeh, perfect for a crowd-pleaser meal that is friendly to Ayurvedic and Sattvic diets.
instructions: Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add onion, ginger, and garlic. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the onion is translucent, about 8 minutes.
Add cumin, coriander, turmeric, and cayenne pepper (if using). Cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add tempeh and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Pour in coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens, about 10 minutes.
Stir in yogurt and cook for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the curry over basmati rice or with naan bread, garnished with cilantro, if desired.
